title: Design Stateful Circuit Breakers
description: Implement distributed circuit breakers using shared state backplanes like Redis. Prevent multi-node thundering herds when upstream dependencies recover from outages. Design fault-tolerant mechanisms for handling intermittent and prolonged downstream dependency failures.
objectives: Implement distributed circuit breakers using shared state backplanes like Redis.
Prevent multi-node thundering herds when upstream dependencies recover from outages.
Design fault-tolerant mechanisms for handling intermittent and prolonged downstream dependency failures.
